name: Analytics & TPI
title: Analytics & TPI
value: Total Performance Intelligence (TPI) across your operations; find and fix hidden gaps.
summary: Total Performance Intelligence (TPI) across your operations; find and fix hidden gaps.
description: Total Performance Intelligence (TPI) and analytics live in the Risk & Intelligence workspace: events, anomalies, correlation, scheduled reports, and TPI snapshots. One view of performance across Carrier, Broker, and Shipper with actionable insights and anomaly detection.
howItWorks: Event streaming and analytics turn operational data into performance metrics, trends, and alerts. TPI snapshots and reporting support Risk & Intelligence and feed domain-specific analytics in Carrier and Broker.
security: Built with zero-trust architecture, all data is encrypted in transit and at rest with comprehensive audit trails.

name: Loadboard
title: Loadboard
value: Faster execution with intelligent matching and structured bidding.
summary: Faster execution with intelligent matching and structured bidding.
description: Intelligent load matching platform that accelerates execution through smart algorithms and structured bidding processes.
howItWorks: Uses AI-powered matching algorithms to connect shippers with carriers, optimizing routes and reducing empty miles.
security: Secure marketplace with encrypted communications and verified carrier credentials.

name: Carrier
title: Carrier Operations
value: Link drivers, vehicles, and commitments to measurable outcomes.
summary: Link drivers, vehicles, and commitments to measurable outcomes.
description: Carrier Operations connects drivers, vehicles, and commitments to measurable outcomes. Fleet & Operations (loads board, fleet & drivers, scheduling, assignments), Dispatch & Logistics (route planning, delivery schedule, documents, optimization, Dispatch Copilot), Safety & DOT (alerts, HOS, maintenance, FMCSA, anomaly detection), and Finance (invoices, cost estimates, load analytics, payments) in one workspace.
howItWorks: Real-time telemetry and performance tracking drive on-time delivery and safety compliance. Loadboard consumption and bids, HOS/ELD sync, trust score and risk signals are integrated per carrier.
security: Multi-tenant isolation with role-based access control and comprehensive audit logging.

name: Emissions & Sustainability
title: Emissions & Sustainability
value: Trip‑level CO₂ with baselines, targets, and audit‑ready exports.
summary: Emissions and sustainability insights integrated with Carrier and Rating (trust score) domains.
description: Emissions and sustainability tracking integrated with carrier and rating data. Trip-level CO₂ monitoring, baselines, targets, and audit-ready reporting so you can hit sustainability goals and prove compliance.
howItWorks: Captures emissions-related data and calculates CO₂ intensity with baseline comparisons and target tracking, integrated with fleet and rating domains.
security: Data integrity protection with cryptographic signatures and immutable audit trails for compliance reporting.

name: Intelligence
title: Intelligence
value: Multi‑domain risk scoring + short, decision-ready reports on location risk.
summary: Multi‑domain risk scoring + short, decision-ready reports on location risk.
description: Risk & Intelligence is the cross-cutting workspace: intelligence hub, alerts, anomaly detection, event and security feeds, correlation, location assessment (quick/standard/deep), report generation, playbooks, entities, and ML model registry. TPI snapshots and analytics feed Carrier and Broker.
howItWorks: Analyzes multiple risk domains to generate location assessments and decision-ready reports. Events and anomalies flow into playbooks and thresholds; strategic locations and ML models support predictive risk.
security: Secure risk data processing with encrypted storage and controlled access to sensitive intelligence.

name: Rating
title: Rating
value: Carrier Trust Engine (0–100) with tiers, normalization, and governance.
summary: Carrier Trust Engine (0–100) with tiers, normalization, and governance.
description: Comprehensive carrier rating system providing a 0-100 trust score with tiered classifications, normalization, and governance. Scores reflect recent performance more than old history (intelligent decay) so ratings stay relevant.
howItWorks: Aggregates performance data to calculate trust scores; recent performance is weighted more than older data so ratings stay fair and up to date. Tier-based normalization enables fair comparisons across carriers.
security: Secure rating algorithms with immutable scoring history and dispute resolution workflows.

name: Warehouse & Inventory
title: Warehouse & Inventory
value: Real‑time stock accuracy with forecasting and auditability.
summary: Warehouse operations with real‑time stock accuracy, forecasting, and auditability.
description: Inventory and stock management for the warehouse: real-time accuracy, demand forecasting, and audit capabilities. Supports dock scheduling, capacity planning, and safety compliance in one workspace.
howItWorks: Uses IoT sensors and AI forecasting to maintain accurate inventory levels with predictive analytics and audit trails within the warehouse workspace.
security: Secure inventory data with encrypted storage and access controls for sensitive stock information.

name: Admin & Security
title: Admin & Security
value: Security as a Service that fails closed—unified policy and tamper-evident logs.
summary: Security as a Service that fails closed—unified policy and tamper-evident logs.
description: Security as a Service (SECaaS) that fails closed: if something goes wrong, access is denied by default and the event is logged. Unified policy management and tamper-evident, detailed audit logs so you can prove who did what and when.
howItWorks: Security runs before business logic. Implements zero-trust (verify every request), continuous monitoring, threat detection, and automated response so your data and access stay protected.
security: Built-in security controls with fail-closed architecture and comprehensive audit trails for all security events.

name: Trust Pilot
title: Trust Pilot
value: Public reviews with moderation and reputation analytics.
summary: Public reviews with moderation and reputation analytics.
description: Public review platform with AI-powered moderation and comprehensive reputation analytics for transparent feedback systems.
howItWorks: Collects and moderates public reviews using AI to ensure quality while providing reputation analytics and insights.
security: Secure review data with content moderation and privacy controls for user-generated content.

name: Warehouse
title: Warehouse
value: Door scheduling, capacity management, and safety compliance.
summary: Door scheduling, capacity management, and safety compliance.
description: Comprehensive warehouse management system providing door scheduling, capacity management, and safety compliance monitoring.
howItWorks: Optimizes warehouse operations through intelligent scheduling, capacity planning, and safety protocol enforcement.
security: Secure warehouse data with access controls and audit trails for all operational activities.

name: Shipper Control Tower
title: Shipper Control Tower
value: Supply overview, warehouse and dock, supply chain risk, and load exchange.
summary: Supply overview, warehouse and dock, supply chain risk, and load exchange.
description: Shipper Control Tower gives you supply chain visibility, warehouse and dock management, supply chain risk signals, compliance and governance, and a load exchange—all in one workspace.
howItWorks: Integrates with your ERP and uses intelligence to assess supplier and route risk. Warehouse and dock capacity are managed with entitlement controls; compliance events feed an audit trail.
security: Multi-tenant isolation with role-based access; compliance and intelligence data encrypted in transit and at rest.

name: Broker
title: Broker
value: Digital brokerage with automated matching and end‑to‑end execution.
summary: Digital brokerage with automated matching and end‑to‑end execution.
description: Broker Desk delivers the full load pipeline: create and manage loads, marketplace and bids, carrier network, route planning and schedule/track, finance (invoices, payments, settlements), risk & compliance (credentials, insurance, claims), and collaboration (documents, threads). Governed by TSM and preflight checks.
howItWorks: Load lifecycle is governed (assign carrier, start transit, resolve claim). AI-powered matching and carrier recommendations; route risk and carrier trust scores; predictive load demand and performance analytics.
security: Secure brokerage transactions with encrypted communications and verified participant credentials.
